name: board-refinement
description: Production-grade Trello board refinement routine — four stages (PM+CTO plan + PRD gap audit, CTO deploy-gate verdict + staging spin-up, QA TDD audit + sanity test, pre-prod readiness verification). v0.2 adds opt-in adversarial-review dynamic-workflows at Stage 1 (PRD gap audit) and Stage 4 (pre-prod readiness gate).
